function.name: dust_query
function.description: Execute a SQL query against a dust branchable database and return results as JSON. Supports SELECT, GROUP BY, UNION, CTEs, window functions, and date/time functions.

sql.description: SQL query to execute (SELECT, SHOW, EXPLAIN)

path.description: Path to the dust project directory (defaults to current directory)

function.name: dust_exec
function.description: Execute SQL statements that modify the database (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, CREATE TABLE, CREATE INDEX, DROP). For idempotent retries, use INSERT OR REPLACE.

sql.description: SQL statement(s) to execute (DDL or DML)

path.description: Path to the dust project directory (defaults to current directory)

function.name: dust_import
function.description: Import data from a file into dust. Supports CSV, JSON, JSONL, XLSX, Parquet, and SQL dump formats. Auto-detects format by file extension.

file.description: Path to the data file to import

table.description: Target table name (defaults to filename without extension)

path.description: Path to the dust project directory (defaults to current directory)

function.name: dust_schema
function.description: Get the schema of one or all tables in the database. Returns CREATE TABLE statements and column information.

table.description: Table name to describe (omit for all tables)

path.description: Path to the dust project directory (defaults to current directory)

function.name: dust_status
function.description: Get project status including current branch, table count, schema fingerprint, and health.

path.description: Path to the dust project directory (defaults to current directory)

function.name: dust_branch_create
function.description: Create a new branch. Branches are isolated copies of the database for safe experimentation.

path.description: Path to the dust project directory (defaults to current directory)
Path to the dust project directory (defaults to current directory)

function.name: dust_branch_diff
function.description: Compare two branches and show differences in row counts per table.

path.description: Path to the dust project directory (defaults to current directory)

function.name: dust_sandbox_create
function.description: Create a throwaway scratch branch for speculative exploration. Ideal for trying transformations before committing.

name.description: Optional branch name (auto-generated timestamped name if omitted)

path.description: Path to the dust project directory (defaults to current directory)

function.name: dust_sandbox_eval
function.description: Run SQL on a sandbox branch without affecting main. Returns query results from the sandbox.

sql.description: SQL to execute on the sandbox

path.description: Path to the dust project directory (defaults to current directory)
